step_1_context.text: The meeting starts at 9:00, on Monday, in May.

step_2_explanation.simple_rule: Use at for precise time, on for days/dates, and in for months, years, and longer periods.
step_2_explanation.formula: at + time | on + day/date | in + month/year/period
step_2_explanation.common_mistake: Do not say 'in Monday' or 'on 7 PM'.
